name: Marbled Pumpkin Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Coat an 8-inch square baking dish with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese and granulated sugar until smooth.
4. Gradually add egg substitutes, mixing until smooth.
5. In another bowl, combine brown sugar, prune puree, egg whites, and vanilla; beat until well blended.
6. Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, salt, and cloves in a separate bowl; stir into prune mixture to blend thoroughly.
7. Beat in pumpkin.
8. Pour batter into the baking dish.
9. Drop heaping tablespoons of cream cheese mixture over the batter.
10. Gently swirl the cream cheese mixture into the batter using a small knife.
11. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Serve warm (not hot) with nonfat vanilla ice cream or frozen yogurt, if desired.
Makes 9 squares (3-inch each).
